requirements.summary: Debug and fix the ImageUpload component to ensure images are successfully uploaded and stored, then verified in ProductCard and ProductDetail displays
acceptanceCriteria: Image files can be selected through the file input
Selected images display correctly in the preview
Upload progress indicator shows accurate progress
Images are successfully converted to ExternalBlob format
Backend receives and stores the image blob data correctly
Uploaded images can be retrieved and displayed in ProductCard and ProductDetail components

file_operations.description: Fix the ExternalBlob creation and upload progress tracking. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing. Ensure proper error handling for file selection, preview rendering, and blob conversion. Add detailed logging to track upload state transitions and identify failure points in the upload pipeline.

Update the ImageUpload integration to properly handle the ExternalBlob returned from the component. Ensure the form submission correctly passes the blob to the addSnackItem backend method. Add error boundary and loading states during image upload. Verify proper state management between ImageUpload component and form submission.

Verify that ExternalBlob images retrieved from backend are properly displayed using getDirectURL() method. Add error handling for missing or failed image loads. Include fallback image display for broken blob references.

Verify that ExternalBlob images retrieved from backend are properly displayed using getDirectURL() method for the detailed product view. Add error handling for missing or failed image loads with appropriate fallback UI.

requirements.summary: Ensure the Admin page snack creation form properly integrates with ImageUpload component and handles upload errors gracefully
acceptanceCriteria: Form submission waits for image upload completion
Upload errors display clear error messages to admin users
Successful uploads enable the form submit button
Failed uploads prevent form submission and show retry options

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive error handling for ImageUpload failures. Implement form validation that prevents submission until image upload completes successfully. Display clear error messages using toast notifications or inline alerts when upload fails. Add retry mechanism for failed uploads. Disable submit button during upload and enable only after successful blob creation. Track upload state to coordinate form submission timing.

Expose upload state (idle, uploading, success, error) to parent components through callback props. Provide clear error messages for different failure scenarios (file size, format, network). Implement retry functionality that allows re-attempting failed uploads without resetting the component.
